response.praise: Sakalaththaiyum cheyya vallavarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Iraajaathi raajaavae umakku Sthoaththiram
Karththaathi karththarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Thaevaathi thaevanae umakku Sthoaththiram
En kanniirai thutaikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Samaathaanaththai tharukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Jeyaththai kotukkiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Athichayangkal cheykira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ellaam cheyya vallavarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Irakkamulla thaevanae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai nhaesikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Thikkarravanukku sakaayam cheykira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai kaividaamal kaakka valla iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai aaruthalpatuththukiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
En viyaathikalai kunamaakkukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku nhanmai cheyya aayaththamaay irukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennutaiya thunpangkalai ellaam paarkiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
En kuraivukalai ellaam thiirkkiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai maravaamal irukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennutaiya vaentuthalkalai kaetkiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai aachiirvathikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai vituvikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai thaeti varukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Nhaan vaazha vazhikaattukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku vaazhvukkotukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai vaazha vaikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En thukkangkalai maatrukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
ThataikaLai ellaam nhiikkippoatukiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Maranaththirku vilakki kaakkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakkaaka siluvaiyil mariththa iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En paavangkalukkaaka mariththa iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En nhoaykalai aetrukkondavarae umakku Sthoaththiram.
En saabangkaLai nhiikkukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Azhivukku ennai thappuvikkiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Paavangkalai mannikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Paavaththin mael vetri tharukiravarae iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Paavangkalilirunhthu vituvikkiravarae Sthoaththiram
Enakku nhimmathiyai tharukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Nhanmaiyinaal ennai thirupthiyaakkukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai uyiroatu kaakkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ummai nhampukira ennai kaividaatha iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Thaayaipoala ennai thaerrukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai pataiththa iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En iruthayaththai paarkiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Nhaan kettuppoavathai virumpaatha iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Nhaan vaazhnhthiruppathai virumpukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Nhiithiyai virumpukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Anhiithiyai verukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ummai thaetukira enakku palan tharukira iyaechuvae Sthoaththiram
Arputhangkalai cheykira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En kanniirai thutaikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku jeyam kotukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En upaththiravaththai arpamaay ennaatha iyaechuvae Sthoaththiram
Engkalai paathukaakkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enmael manathurukukira karththaraakiya iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ellaavatraiyum pataiththavarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennutaiya nherukkaththai maatrukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku samaathaanaththai tharukira iyaechuvae Sthoaththiram
Parichuththamulla thaevanae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ellaarilum periyavarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Nhanmaikalai tharukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Akkini kadalaakiya nharaka vaethanaikku thappuvikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En alaichchalkalai paarkkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku puthuvaazhvu kotukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Sakaayam cheykira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Aapaththu kaalaththil thunaiyaay iruppavarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku ethiraana chaththuruvin thiimaikalai um vallamaiyaal chutterikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En irulai velichchamaakkukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Nhiithi cheykira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku thaayum thakappanumaay irukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Paavangkalkukku ennai vilakkukira thaevanae umakku Sthoaththiram
Nhiithiyulla karththarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Engkalai paathukaaththu sukamaay irukka cheykira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Sirumaipatdavarkalin kuuppituthalai maravaatha iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Azhukaiyin chaththaththai kaetkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Pithaavae umakku Sthoaththiram
Parichuththa aaviyaanavarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Yaar ennai kaivitdaalum chaerththu kollukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Aapaththu kaalaththilae kuuppitukira ennai vituvikkiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku ethiraana chaththurukkalai ennai vittu vilakkukiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennutaiya ellaa thunpangkalaiyum maatra vallavarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai kaappaatrukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
En thaevaikalai arinhthirukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai makizhvikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Marana vaachalkalilirunhthu thuukki vitukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai thappuvikkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai sukamaay thannkappannukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku aaloachanai kotukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Athichayangkalai seykiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ummai thaetukira ennai kaividaatha iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Thiimaiyai nhanmaiyaay maatrukira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Chaththurukkalin kaiyilirunhthu vitukkira iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ummidaththil varukira ennai puampae thallaatha iyaechuvae umakku Sthoaththiram
Iruthayangkalai thaetrukiravarae umakku Sthoaththiram
Iratchippai tharukira thaevanae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai umathu pillaiyaaka aetrukkontiirae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai sapaiyil kontu vanhthu searththiirae umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku thaevan thanhtha inhtha chapaikkaaka umakku Sthoaththiram
Enakku thaevan thanhtha maeyparukkaaka umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennai iratchiththirae umakku Sthoaththiram
Ennutaiya jepaththai aetrukkolpavarae Sthoaththiram
Sarva puumikkum aandavaraay irukkiravarae Sthoaththiram
Thiingku nhaalil vituvippavarae Sthoaththiram
Sumaikalai nhiikki vituvikkiRavarae Sthoaththiram
sakalavitha arputhangkalin thaevanae Sthoaththiram
Athikaaramum vallamaiyum utaiyavarae Sthoaththiram
Enakkaay siluvai chumanhthavarae Sthoaththiram
Enakkaay siluvaiyil araiyappatdavarae Sthoaththiram
Kaalaithoarum visaarikkiravarae Sthoaththiram
Vaanaththaiyum puumiyaiyum uNdaakkina thaevanae Sthoaththiram
Ummai matravakalukku kaanpikkira itathil vaiththullirae Sthoaththiram
Ennaiyum irulil ullavarkalukku valikaattiyaai vaiththullirae Sthoaththiram
Aahthumaakkalai sampaathikka ngnam tharupavarae Sthoaththiram
Visuvaasaththai peruke seypavare Sthoaththiram
Ninaippatharkkum vaentuvatharkkum athikamaay seykiravarae Sthoaththiram
Enmael kannai vaiththu Aalosanai kotukkiravarae, nadakkum valiyai pothikkiravarae Sthoaththiram
Arputhangkalai saeypavarae Sthoaththiram
Paranthu kaakkira paravaiyaipol en mael aatharavaai errukkiravarae Sthoaththiram
Thuthikkum kanaththirkkum paaththirarae Sthoaththiram
Ennai pelappatuththukira thaevanae Sthoaththiram
